summary: Good audience recording despite the venue's poor acoustics; no specific performance highlights mentioned.
review: The audience tape captures the show with decent clarity, though the building’s crappy sound makes the mix a bit muddy. Reviewers gave it a solid four‑star rating and note that it is one of the better audience sources available for this date, but they provide no comments on the musical performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single four‑star review focusing on recording quality; no detailed show commentary to adjust rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear enough for an audience tape but the venue's acoustics are described as 'crappy sounding', leading to a slightly muddy mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments about set structure or musical performance were provided in the review.
